label_i18n.es: Demanda promedio durante el tiempo de entrega

businessContext_i18n.en: The average total demand expected during the replenishment lead time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden sipariş verme süresi boyunca beklenen ortalama toplam talep.

businessContext_i18n.es: La demanda total promedio esperada durante el tiempo de entrega de reposición.

inputs.label: Reorder Point
inputs.businessContext: Inventory level at which a new order is triggered.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni bir siparişin tetiklendiği stok seviyesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lagerbestand, bei dem eine neue Bestellung ausgelöst wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de stock déclenchant une nouvelle commande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de inventario en el que se activa un nuevo pedido.

inputs.label: Order Quantity
inputs.businessContext: The fixed order quantity placed each time.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fixed order quantity placed each time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her seferinde verilen sabit sipariş miktarı.
